selection_reason: Using the US equity stock peer universe so relative-strength ranking stays within a sensible asset class. The anchor ticker is excluded by default to avoid self-referential ranking and to keep cross-anchor validations more independent.
fallback_rule: If a ticker does not match crypto, forex, futures, or known ETF/commodity lists, treat it as a US equity stock by default.
